Innovative trends in artificial intelligence (AI) have opened up new possibilities for image analysis. Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are the basis of this advancement. We offer comprehensive diagnostic testing solutions across India for autoimmune, neurological issues, cancer detection, genetic screenings, ICU infections, and preventive breast cancer assessments. Our mission is to provide accurate, timely results to support your healthcare journey. Autoimmune Testing We specialize in diagnosing autoimmune disorders through advanced testing methods, ensuring precise and reliable results. Genetic Testing Our genetic testing services help identify hereditary conditions and risk factors, guiding proactive health management. Cancer Screening We provide a range of cancer screening tests including innovative breast cancer preventative screenings to help catch issues early. Get Tested +919035598731 NEUROXON HEALTHCARE SOLUTIONS We are pioneer in bringing the best diagnostics test in one place and reducing the cost and providing the diagnostics tests at home or hospitals. Major Diagnostics Tests- AUTOIMMUNE NEURO DISORDERS TESTS- Autoimmune Atypical Parkinsonism | Autoimmune Dementia | Autoimmune Epilepsy | Myasthenia Gravis | Autoimmune Neuropathy | Alzheimer’s Disease | Autoimmune Encephalitis | Agrin antibody | IgLON5 Antibody | GFAP Antibody | Glycine Receptor | Neurofascin 140, 155, 186 | LRP4 antibody | mGlur1,3,5 | MAG | MOG | Neuromuscular Diseases Panel | Autism Gene panel | Hereditary Spastic Paraplegia Gene Panel | Dystonia Gene Panel | Benign Infantile Epilepsy Panel | Congenital Myasthenic Syndrome Gene Panel | Spinal Muscular Atrophy Panel | Ataxia Gene Panel  & another 100 plus tests….. ONCOLOGY & HEMATOLOGY TESTS- Comprehensive Genomic Profile (CGP-550plus Genes)+ TMB+ MSI | Whole Exome Sequencing + Mitochondrial DNA Analysis | Preventive  Breast Cancer Test-2 days process time | Breast+Ovarian Cancer Panel (93 Genes) | Lung Cancer Tissue Panel (72 Genes) | Lung Cancer Blood Panel (72 Genes) | Endometrial Cancer Panel (31 Genes-BLOOD) | Endometrial Cancer Panel (31 Genes-TISSUE) | Comprehensive Leukemia Panel )SNVs, Indels, CNV, Fusions, TMB, Karyotyping) -RNA 100+ DNA 155 | Comprehensive Hereditary Cancer Panel (154 Genes)  & we have 400 plus test for cancer and genetics ….. ICU INFECTIONS TESTS- Meta NGS test identifies 22000 bacteria, 9000 viruses, 6000 fungi, plus antibiotic resistance markers and sensitivity in a 24 -32 hour process time only. World’s First Hectapelx PCR technology for ICU Infections- Sepsis Panel +AMR | Febrile Neutropenia/ Post Transplant/ Pneumonia/ Myocarditis Panel +AMR | Community Acquired Panel | Hospital Acquired Infection Panel +AMR | Invasive Fungal Infections Panel +AMR | Respiratory Panel | PAN CNS Panel | Meningitis Panel | Acute Encephalitis Panel | Meningo Encephalitis Panel | Uveitis Panel | PAN Uveitis Panel & another 50 plus tests… . Cancer and Genetics- Genomic Instability status measured by Loss of Heterozygosity, (LOH) | Telomeric Allelic Imbalance (TAI) and Large-Scale state Transitions (LST)  | Wide range of NGS |  Microarray |  Karyotying | FISH |  Real time PCR tests on solid tumor cancers including Lung cancer | Breast cancer |  Sarcoma |  Ovarian cancer |  Prostate cancer |  Thyroid cancer | Colorectal cancer | Gastrointestinal Stromal Tumor  |  NGS | DDPCR | Real Time PCR |  Cytogenomics assays are offered to better understand the Hematological Malignancies  | Noninvasive prenatal testing (NIPT).
